install_fields.label: Project Access Token (read)
install_fields.help: Your Rollbar project-level read access token. Find it at Project Settings → Access Tokens.

install_fields.label: Account Access Token
install_fields.help: Optional account-level access token for account-wide operations.

description: Syncs Rollbar error items, occurrences (raw instances), and deploys into the Shielva knowledge base for AI-powered error analysis and incident response.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync items (errors) and deploys from Rollbar.

apis.name: List Items
apis.description: Fetch error items (first SYNC_PAGE_LIMIT pages), optionally filtered by level/status.

apis.name: List Occurrences
apis.description: Fetch raw error occurrences (first SYNC_PAGE_LIMIT pages).

apis.name: Get Item
apis.description: Return a single raw Rollbar item by ID.

name: RollbarConnector
